<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Entity; use Exception; use Psr\Http\Message\ResponseInterface; use RuntimeException; use function json_decode; use function sprintf; /** * @deprecated This data will be better exposed at the model level */ trait JsonResponseTrait { protected $responseJson; /** * @throws Exception * * @return array|mixed */ public function getResponseData() { if (!($this instanceof EntityInterface)) { throw new RuntimeException( sprintf( '%s can only be used if the class implements %s', __TRAIT__, EntityInterface::class ) ); } /** @phpstan-ignore-next-line */ if (($response = @$this->getResponse()) && ($response instanceof ResponseInterface)) { if ($response->getBody()->isSeekable()) { $response->getBody()->rewind(); } $body = $response->getBody()->getContents(); $this->responseJson = json_decode($body, true); return $this->responseJson; } return []; } }
